description_long: This object is a rectangular, upright parcel box with a deep teal color and gold lettering. The front and back faces display the brand name 'Trois Rivières' and the designation 'VSOP', along with additional descriptive text in smaller print. The box is made of sturdy cardboard and features a top flap that is partially open, indicating it can be accessed from above. The sides are plain except for the brand name running vertically in gold. The overall finish is smooth and slightly glossy, giving it a premium appearance suitable for packaging high-value items such as spirits.
description: A tall, teal rectangular parcel box with gold branding and a partially open top flap, made of smooth, glossy cardboard.
description_view_0: The back face of the box, showing dense gold text and the 'Trois Rivières' and 'VSOP' branding.
description_view_1: A side view with the brand name 'Trois Rivières' running vertically in gold and the top flap partially open.
description_view_2: The front face, featuring the main 'Trois Rivières' and 'VSOP' branding in gold, with a small emblem above.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the vertical gold brand name and the open top flap visible.
